successPatterns.pattern: Instances with complete input evidence reached UDID within target window.

failurePatterns.pattern: Missing evidence URI caused repeated claim submission stalls.

blockedOverduePatterns.pattern: Review node became overdue when assignee UCAN delegation expired.

actorCapabilityPatterns.pattern: Assigned actor lacked flow/node/execute on one data lane.

uncertainty: Three instances have runtime logs but no UDID yet; exclude them from success-rate conclusions until evaluation completes.
